General.Name: Inpost SA
General.Description: InPost S.A., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an out-of-home e-commerce enablement platform providing parcel locker services in Poland and other European countries. InPost S.A. was founded in 1999 and is based in Luxembourg, Luxembourg.
